title: polystichopsis mutica
intro: Polystichopsis mutica, also known as the Japanese holly fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Polystichopsis mutica include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Polystichopsis mutica can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional East Asian medicine as a component in various formulations.
